sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_neighbors (id Int32, value Int32) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
UPDATE test_neighbors SET value = value + 50 WHERE id = 2;
SELECT id, value, neighbor(value, 1) AS next_value FROM test_neighbors ORDER BY id;
SELECT id, neighbor(value, -1, -1) AS previous_value FROM test_neighbors ORDER BY id;
